calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing On The Cross-Complaint Filed By Raymond K.Y. Li.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Paul Perdue, Esq. and Paul Kanter, Esq. appeared with defendant and cross-complainant Ray K.Y. Li, who was placed under oath and examined.
Chance Whitman, defendant & cross-complainant's insurance adjuster, was placed under oath and examined.
Default entered against defendant & cross-defendant Kent Kwan, indivdually and dba Han Construction on March 22, 2007.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of defendant and cross-complainant Ray K.Y. Li, and against the defaulted defendant and cross-defendant Kent Kwan, individually and dba Han Construction as follows:

Damages/Principal - $399,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - $21,551.46.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $11,568.32, for a total judgment in the amount of $432,119.78.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Continued To Dec-09-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2008 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion And X-Complainant Raymond K.Y. Li'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal Of X-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Cross-Complainant Raymond K. Y. Li's Motion to Vacate Dismissal of Cross-Complaint is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal of Cross-Complaint is ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re: Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on 6/10/2008 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Denise Doucette, CSR#5963. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
